## 🐛 Describe the Bug
<!-- Clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## 📍 Where Did It Happen?
<!-- Describe the location/context where the bug occurred -->

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- What should have happened? -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? -->

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 📸 Screenshots or Video
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recording -->

## 🖥️ Environment
### Browser & Device
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Linux Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S23]

### App Version
- **Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]

### Browser Storage
- **localStorage enabled:** Yes / No
- **Approximate data size:** [e.g., 100 KB]

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information -->

## 🔍 Troubleshooting Attempted
<!-- What have you already tried? -->
- [ ] Cleared browser cache
- [ ] Tried different browser
- [ ] Tried on different device
- [ ] Restarted browser
- [ ] Checked console for errors (F12)

## 📝 Console Errors
<!-- Any errors in browser console (F12 → Console) -->
```
Paste error message here
```
